title: HeLa maintenance (ATCC)
description: Adherent HeLa (ATCC CCL-2) in EMEM + 10% FBS, split 1:2 to 1:6. Source: ATCC https://www.atcc.org/products/ccl-2

payload.description: Routine maintenance of adherent HeLa cervical adenocarcinoma cells per the ATCC CCL-2 product sheet. Complete growth medium: EMEM (ATCC 30-2003) + 10% FBS. Subcultivation ratio 1:2 to 1:6. Dissociate with 0.25% (w/v) trypsin / 0.53 mM EDTA, 5 to 15 min. 37 C, 5% CO2. Seeding density and doubling time are not stated on the ATCC product sheet, so they are omitted. The day cadence below is an editable starting point. Source: ATCC CCL-2 https://www.atcc.org/products/ccl-2

cell_line.name: HeLa
cell_line.notes: ATCC CCL-2. Grow at 37 C, 5% CO2. Serum is fetal bovine serum (ATCC 30-2020) at 10%. Source: https://www.atcc.org/products/ccl-2

planned_events.notes: Seed day. Briefly rinse with 0.25% trypsin / 0.53 mM EDTA to remove serum, add 2 to 3 mL Trypsin-EDTA, disperse 5 to 15 min, quench with 6 to 8 mL complete medium, count, and reseed.
Subculture at roughly 80 to 90% confluence. Repeat the trypsinize and reseed.
